classificationRules.meaning: Complete pure Kotlin target contract has implementation evidence.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: A GPU artifact is additionally required whenever a GPU route is claimed.

classificationRules.meaning: Current code supports a narrower compatibility behavior with documented limits.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must not imply complete target support or GPU renderer support.

classificationRules.meaning: The target wants this behavior but implementation evidence is missing.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must name the owning spec and next evidence gate before any support promotion.

classificationRules.meaning: A required pure Kotlin dependency or contract is not delivered yet.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must remain blocked until the dependency delivers target evidence.

classificationRules.meaning: Code or current evidence exists, but normative fixtures, goldens, or provenance are missing.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must not promote until fixture provenance is attached.

classificationRules.meaning: CPU or text route evidence exists, but the GPU artifact route is missing or unpromoted.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Any GPU-claimed row without a GPU artifact must stay GPU-gated.

classificationRules.meaning: The behavior is outside the complete Kanvas target and has stable refusal policy.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must link the architecture or spec decision that keeps the refusal intentional.

classificationRules.meaning: External comparison can be recorded but is never a normative oracle.
classificationRules.promotionPolicy: Must not become target support without Kanvas-owned fixture, dump, CPU oracle, and required GPU evidence.

requiredEvidenceKinds.requiredWhen: Required before target-supported promotion and before fixture-gated rows can move.
Required before target-supported promotion and for current-supported compatibility rows.
Required before target-supported promotion and for CPU-only evidence samples.
Required whenever a row claims GPU support.
Required for every row that routes, gates, or refuses text/font behavior.
Required for expected-unsupported rows, tracked gaps, and legacy gates.

surfaceRows.label: A8 outline rasterization
requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this row as CPU-only KFONT-M9-003 rasterization evidence; KFONT-M9-004 SDF boundaries, KFONT-M9-005 atlas lifecycle, and M11 GPU handoff remain separate gates.
Do not claim LCD support, GPU sampling, external rasterizer parity, or dftext retirement from the A8 mask dump alone.

surfaceRows.label: cluster safety
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M5-005 now provides bounded grapheme, bidi, and script boundary-alignment evidence only; shaping, fallback, and paragraph routes remain separate gates.
Keep `scaledemoji` blocked on color, route, and rendering evidence rather than treating the bounded M5 plus M7 refusal/fallback evidence as emoji support.

surfaceRows.label: complex shaping
requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this row dependency-gated until contextual GSUB, mark/cursive GPOS, and required-script fixture rows land through KFONT-M6-003, KFONT-M6-005, KFONT-M6-007, KFONT-M6-008, KFONT-M6-009, and KFONT-M6-010.
Deliver CPU oracle evidence and reviewed per-script positive plus refusal fixtures before any complex-shaping support promotion.
Keep complex shaping separate from simple drawString compatibility and from any GPU text-route claim.

surfaceRows.label: emoji/color
requiredEvidenceGates: Deliver color glyph plans, emoji sequence route traces, fallback facts, CPU oracle evidence, and GPU artifact evidence when GPU is claimed.
Split COLR, bitmap, SVG, fallback, and shaping blockers instead of using emoji supported.

surfaceRows.label: fallback
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M7-004 now adds bounded cluster-safe fallback segmentation evidence, but the negative emoji row still reports a reviewed split hazard and does not retire `scaledemoji`.
Keep host-dependent system scan examples explicitly non-normative unless a reviewed product decision folds them into the bundled catalog or shared fallback dump surfaces.
Add CPU oracle evidence for fallback decisions before promotion.

surfaceRows.label: Font parser metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: All M12 telemetry domains now have checked-in deterministic producer evidence; parser/scaler rows stay advisory-only and do not promote GPU-route, `dftext`, or release-gate support.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: Font scaler metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: All M12 telemetry domains now have checked-in deterministic producer evidence; parser/scaler rows stay advisory-only and do not promote GPU-route, `dftext`, or release-gate support.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: font telemetry schema
requiredEvidenceGates: All M12 telemetry domains now have checked-in deterministic producer evidence; this row stays schema-only/advisory and does not promote GPU-route, `dftext`, or release-gate support.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: Glyph artifact metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-004 now lands deterministic glyph artifact telemetry for route counts plus bounded A8/SDF/COLR/bitmap/SVG CPU preparation costs.
Keep GPU text-route promotion, executed-upload claims, `dftext` retirement, and any release-gate promotion on the broader M11 GPU handoff chain and explicit GPU evidence.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: GlyphArtifactPlan route taxonomy
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-003 now attaches sourceRepresentationSha256 linkage and checked-in A8 mask evidence; complete KFONT-M9-004 and KFONT-M9-005 before promoting atlas lifecycle or GPU text route support.
Keep this row as route-taxonomy evidence only; it proves selection traces and explicit refusals, not production COLR/bitmap/SVG payloads or GPU handoff.

surfaceRows.label: Glyph atlas eviction and invalidation
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-005 and KFONT-M9-006 now land CPU atlas generation/eviction and cache telemetry evidence; the M11 GPU handoff chain still gates any GPU atlas support claim.
Legacy dftext remains open until explicit M11 upload-before-sample and GPU route replacement evidence are linked.

surfaceRows.label: Glyph atlas occupancy
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-004 now lands stable atlas artifact IDs, key hashes, dimensions, entry counts, and occupancy ratios without claiming GPU execution or dftext retirement.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: Glyph cache metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-004 now lands deterministic cache telemetry for pack time, resident/upload bytes, hit/miss/eviction, invalidation-token changes, and stable atlas refusal diagnostics.
Keep GPU text-route promotion, executed-upload claims, `dftext` retirement, and any release-gate promotion on the broader M11 GPU handoff chain and explicit GPU evidence.
Keep all performance budgets advisory until an explicit budget-promotion target/spec update exists.

surfaceRows.label: Glyph cache telemetry
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-006 now lands CPU cache inventory and advisory telemetry evidence; keep any GPU text-route or upload-execution claim gated on M11.
Keep advisory cache budgets non-blocking until an explicit M12 acceptance update promotes named baselines and variance policy.

surfaceRows.label: GlyphStrikeKey completeness
requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this row as contract-only evidence; KFONT-M9-003 now lands A8 raster evidence, but KFONT-M9-004 SDF boundaries and KFONT-M9-005 atlas lifecycle still gate broader artifact promotion.
Keep this row as contract-only evidence; it proves key identity and refusals, not glyph artifact production.

surfaceRows.label: GPU text handoff metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-005 now lands deterministic advisory GPU handoff metrics for selected A8 handoff rows plus bounded refusal diagnostics across SDF, outline, color, bitmap, SVG, upload-plan, generation-stale, budget, nondeterministic-key, and CPU-rendered-texture cases.

Keep GPU support promotion, `dftext` retirement, executed-upload claims, and any release-gate promotion on the broader M11 GPU handoff chain and explicit GPU evidence; telemetry alone does not promote support.

surfaceRows.label: GPU text route refusals
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-005 now keeps stable refusal diagnostics visible in one advisory telemetry family while preserving explicit unregistered/upload-missing/stale/budget/CPU-texture and route-capability boundaries.
Keep `dftext` open and keep GPU support promotion or release-gate promotion on the broader M11 GPU handoff chain and explicit GPU evidence; refusal metrics alone do not promote support.

surfaceRows.label: GPU text upload metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-005 now lands deterministic advisory upload-plan evidence with stable artifact key hashes, upload dependency ordering, upload byte counts, and bounded reuse counters.
Keep this row bounded to payload-hand-off evidence only; it does not by itself prove executed GPU uploads, route promotion, or release-gate readiness.

surfaceRows.label: outline/path
requiredEvidenceGates: Complete target promotion still requires glyph outline contract evidence and CPU oracle artifacts.
Current simple drawString compatibility does not imply complex shaping, fallback, SDF, color, LCD, or GPU text support.

surfaceRows.label: Paragraph layout metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-003 now lands deterministic paragraph telemetry slices for shaping requests, wrapped layout, hit testing, selection queries, and placeholder conflict diagnostics; complete paragraph bidi visual-order evidence and authoritative word/grapheme boundary queries remain separate M8 gates.
Do not treat paragraph telemetry alone as paragraph parity, GPU text readiness, or a performance release gate.

surfaceRows.label: SDF
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M9-004 now lands checked-in CPU SDF artifact evidence; KFONT-M9-005 atlas/cache lifecycle evidence and the M11 GPU handoff chain still gate any GPU SDF support claim.
Legacy dftext remains open until atlas/cache evidence and explicit M11 GPU replacement evidence are linked.

surfaceRows.label: simple-latin atlas
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M11-004 now lands bounded pure Kotlin `gpu-text-a8-route-plan.json` and `gpu-text-a8-route-refusals.json` dumps plus focused simple-Latin GPU evidence; keep this row limited to the accepted A8 atlas route only.
Do not broaden this row into general text GPU support, SDF/outline/color/bitmap/SVG routing, complex shaping, fallback fonts, emoji, or `dftext` retirement until the remaining M11 chain closes.

surfaceRows.label: Skia facade adapter inventory
requiredEvidenceGates: Keep this row as M13 coordination evidence only; route-specific support promotion still belongs to KFONT-M13-002, KFONT-M13-003, and KFONT-M13-004.
Preserve the simple deterministic `SkCanvas.drawString` boundary and keep missing paragraph facade scope plus typed handoff gates visible without broadening any support claim.
Keep `pdf_never_embed` visible as an adjacent/out-of-scope durable gate instead of assigning it a false runtime facade owner.

surfaceRows.label: Text shaping metrics
requiredEvidenceGates: KFONT-M12-003 now lands deterministic shaping telemetry slices for Latin, Arabic, Devanagari, Thai, mixed bidi, CJK variation selector, and explicit emoji/fallback refusal cases; keep `scaledemoji` blocked on broader emoji fallback, color glyph, and rendering evidence.
Do not treat shaping telemetry alone as script-support promotion, emoji support, paragraph parity, GPU text readiness, or a performance release gate.

negativeGenericLabels.label: emoji supported
negativeGenericLabels.replacementRequirement: Split emoji/color into sequence shaping, fallback, color glyph representation, CPU oracle, GPU artifact, and refusal diagnostics.

negativeGenericLabels.label: font missing
negativeGenericLabels.replacementRequirement: Name the missing source, table, glyph, fallback, fixture, route, or dependency blocker with a stable diagnostic.

negativeGenericLabels.label: text works
negativeGenericLabels.replacementRequirement: Replace broad success wording with a route-specific row such as outline/path, simple-latin atlas, complex shaping, fallback, emoji/color, SDF, or LCD.

requiredRetirementEvidence: GPU artifact when GPU is claimed
CPU/GPU evidence for the claimed slice
Do not add Fontations as product dependency
FreeType/Fontations parity is not a product oracle
Keep separate from the pure Kotlin runtime font core unless a future PDF subset spec adopts it

nonClaims: Does not add emoji or color font support.
Does not add GPU text support.
